generated_oml:
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected path for driver trust"
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Report generation for system performance analysis enabling human decision-making"
]

instance ACCSystemExecutionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "ACC system execution on Digital Twin for computation offloading",
    IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system via remote UI",
    IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system via remote UI",
    IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed via remote UI",
    IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking activation via remote UI",
    IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization and report generation for system monitoring",
    provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Execution of ACC system on Digital Twin for computation offloading",
    provides ACCSystemExecutionAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control of ACC system via UI (enable/disable, set speed, emergency braking)",
    provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for component integration",
    enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpackEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for Jetson programming",
    enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance PythonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 implementation for data processing",
    enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CppEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ implementation for performance-critical components",
    enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex system modeling",
    enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance WiFiEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication",
    enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for LiDAR point cloud data",
    inputTo PythonEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking",
    inputTo PythonEnabler
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control logic for lead vehicle detection and speed computation",
    inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data",
    producedData LidarPointCloudsDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth perception",
    producedData DepthDataTransmitted
]

instance VedderESC : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for vehicle speed data collection",
    producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor for vehicle steering state",
    producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LidarPointCloudsDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    producedFrom VedderESC
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance LidarPointCloudsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR",
    fromData LidarPointCloudsDataTransmitted
]

instance DepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth perception data from Intel Deepsense D435i",
    fromData DepthDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data from Vedder Electronic Speed Controller",
    fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data from steering sensor",
    fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks data processed from LiDAR and depth camera",
    fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
]

instance SQLDatabaseData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured data storage for vehicle metrics and sensor readings",
    inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance MotorActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuator controlled via voltage commands for speed adjustments"
]

instance SteeringServoActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator controlled via voltage commands for steering adjustments"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNXComputer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX microcomputer for processing"
]

instance OrinNanoComputer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Orin Nano microcomputer for processing"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorActuationFE, SteeringServoActuationFE, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VedderESC, SteeringAngleSensor, NVIDIAJetsonNXComputer, OrinNanoComputer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "ACC control signals for desired speed, emergency braking commands, and steering adjustments sent to motor and steering servo actuators, generated by the Controlling FE and Actuation FE."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms as specified in requirements R7 and R8."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Structured into Physical Twin Entity (vehicle hardware), Digital Twin Entity (ACC, data processing), User Entity (UI), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation FE), adhering to ISO 23247 reference architecture with modifications."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (cyber-physical experimentation for ADAS development) and operation phase (real-time ACC monitoring and control during vehicle operation)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-entity communication within hardware, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication between vehicle and remote servers; Data Translation FE handles serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions with ≤100 ms latency per 3GPP 22.185."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle hardware (Jetson Orin Nano); Digital Twin Entity and User Entity hosted on cloud or remote servers for computation offloading."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for digital twin framework, with ROS2 middleware and 3GPP 22.185 for V2V communication standards."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical nature respected with latency compliance to 3GPP 22.185; no explicit security protocols (e.g., encryption, authentication) detailed in the document."
]
